summary: Tested AI Designer async task system and navbar logo fix for TemaDom Bulgarian construction platform. 8/9 backend tests passed (1 transient timeout on health check). Frontend landing page, theme toggle, navigation all working correctly. Navbar logo properly sized at 64x64px (not squished). AI Designer requires auth as expected.

minor.issue: Transient timeout in test (works when tested via curl)

passed_tests: BACKEND: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials returns token
BACKEND: POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials returns 401
BACKEND: POST /api/ai-designer/photo-generate endpoint exists (422 without photo)
BACKEND: POST /api/ai-designer/photo-generate returns task_id immediately (<5 seconds) - ASYNC CONFIRMED
BACKEND: Task polling endpoint returns progress updates (status, progress, message)
FRONTEND: Landing page loads in dark mode (default)
FRONTEND: Theme toggle switches to light mode correctly
FRONTEND: Logo visible and properly sized in both modes (64x64px, not squished)
FRONTEND: Navigation items found: Главна, Калкулатор, Фирми и Майстори, Обяви
FRONTEND: AI Designer (/ai-designer) requires authentication (auth gate displayed for non-logged users)

async_task_system.description: POST /api/ai-designer/photo-generate returns task_id immediately, client polls GET /api/ai-designer/task/{task_id} for progress
async_task_system.response_time: <2 seconds for task submission (async design confirmed)

navbar_logo_fix.description: Logo now 64x64px, properly sized with object-contain, not squished

critical_code_review_comments: Async task system correctly implemented with in-memory _tasks dict for task state
Task cleanup implemented via aio.call_later (300s for done, 60s for error)
Progress updates work via update_task_progress function
Logo fix properly applied with h-12 lg:h-16 and object-contain
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Designer async task system confirmed working. POST to photo-generate returns task_id immediately (<2s), then poll GET /task/{task_id} every 3s for status/progress. Full task takes 30-40s to complete. Use /app/test_bathroom.jpg for testing. Navbar logo fix confirmed - now 64x64px, not squished.
